title: Holly Keiser
compiled_truth: Holly Keiser is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-04-13 to 2002-01-30), Holly Keiser sent 158 and received 497 emails, totalling 655 interactions. Top correspondents: [Frank Sayre](people/frank-sayre) (82), [Stephanie Panus](people/stephanie-panus) (82), [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (77), [Mary Cook](people/mary-cook) (73), [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (73).
